title: Strange error when mixing S3 catalogs
description:
### Describe the bug
Strange error, not sure if an issue. I am mixing glue and hive catalogs.
### How to reproduce
Replace minio host, port, user and password, then run:
```sql
CREATE DATABASE d0 ENGINE = DataLakeCatalog('thrift://hive:9083', 'minio_user', 'minio_password')
SETTINGS catalog_type = 'hive', warehouse = 'htest', storage_endpoint = 'http://minio1:9001/warehouse-hms';
CREATE TABLE d0.t0 (`c0` String, `c1` String, `c2` Array(Nullable(String))) ENGINE = S3('http://minio1:9001/warehouse-glue/cat83/', 'minio_user', 'minio_password', JSONCompactColumns, 'LZMA') PARTITION BY tuple()
SETTINGS storage_catalog_type = 'glue', storage_warehouse = 'gtest', storage_storage_endpoint = 'http://minio1:9001/warehouse-glue',
storage_catalog_url = 'http://glue:3000', storage_region = 'us-east-1', input_format_with_names_use_header = 0;
/*
DB::Exception: Table cannot have empty namespace: t0
*/
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> executeQuery: Code: 36. DB::Exception: Table cannot have empty namespace: t0.
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x00000000265d68f2
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:116: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x00000000140a11a6
2. src/Common/Exception.h:119: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000cd965ac
3. src/Common/Exception.h:137: DB::Exception::Exception<String const&>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String const&>::type>, String const&) @ 0x000000000df34176
4. src/Databases/DataLake/Common.cpp:116: DataLake::parseTableName(String const&) @ 0x0000000019865eaa
5. src/Databases/DataLake/DatabaseDataLake.cpp:307: DB::DatabaseDataLake::isTableExist(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x000000001a1c9c1e
6. src/Interpreters/InterpreterCreateQuery.cpp:1805: DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::doCreateTable(DB::ASTCreateQuery&, DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::TableProperties const&, std::unique_ptr<DB::DDLGuard, std::default_delete<DB::DDLGuard>>&, DB::LoadingStrictnessLevel) @ 0x000000001af7cf1c
7. src/Interpreters/InterpreterCreateQuery.cpp:1752: DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::createTable(DB::ASTCreateQuery&) @ 0x000000001af77cec
8. src/Interpreters/InterpreterCreateQuery.cpp:2362: DB::InterpreterCreateQuery::execute() @ 0x000000001af84ad2
9. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1561: DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, DB::ReadBuffer*, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>) @ 0x000000001b315543
10. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1769: DB::executeQuery(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) @ 0x000000001b30f4bb
11. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:739: DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() @ 0x000000001e59e18f
12. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2740: DB::TCPHandler::run() @ 0x000000001e5b8024
13. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40: Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x000000002668d1c7
14. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerDispatcher.cpp:115: Poco::Net::TCPServerDispatcher::run() @ 0x000000002668d7a5
15. base/poco/Foundation/src/ThreadPool.cpp:205: Poco::PooledThread::run() @ 0x000000002662c97f
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE d1.t1 (id INT UNSIGNED, name VARCHAR(255), tags JSON, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO d1.t1 (id, name, tags) VALUES (1, 'test', JSON_ARRAY('tag1', NULL, 'tag3'));
SELECT id, name, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(tags, '$[0]')) AS tag FROM d1.t1 WHERE created_at >= '2023-01-01 00:00:00';
CREATE TABLE d1.t2 (ref_id INT UNSIGNED, description VARCHAR(255));
key_bug_features: Mixing glue and hive catalogs in S3
